songs.title: Blue Valentine
feed: “Blue Valentine” by NMIXX spends a 6th week at #1 in the Personal Hot 100.
“Blue Valentine” by NMIXX is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 60 sales units.
“Blue Valentine” by NMIXX is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 155 streams units.
“Blue Valentine” by NMIXX is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 6 airplay units.
“Blue Valentine” by NMIXX is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 371,084 total units.
